emails.subject: deal
emails.body: Hi Chris! I noticed you entered sitara 1135849 today. I need you to please write a ticket a.s.a.p. so I can hedge the deal and book it financially. Thank you, Alejandra

emails.subject: RE: deal
emails.body: RE: deal Also for deal 1135855 Thank you Chris. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: deal
emails.body: RE: deal You need that for a 1 month index deal? To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: deal
emails.body: Sorry about that. i do so few of these and i just asked andy about it. i won't be doing any deals for anyone elses book in the future. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: deal
emails.body: I put both tickets in the box next to Sandra's desk. Thanks To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: deal
emails.body: Thank you Chris. Have a great weekend! To: Chavez, Alejandra
